chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 376 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 1747/2025 (Ex) 3. For hearing of main case. 21.05.2025. Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for Petitioner. ***************** From perusal of record it appears that there is civil dispute between the parties over landed property and no case for indulgence is made out. Accordingly this petition is dismissed, however, official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
